theme_and_archetype.rationale: Researchers and students analyzing multiple documents need absolute clarity, authority, and minimal cognitive load. We avoid trendy 'dark-mode neon' or soft pastels in favor of an objective, highly functional 'Control Room' interface. Color is strictly functional (e.g., highlighting contradictions or search diffs).

rules.anti_default: Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans for headings. Enforce Cabinet Grotesk for its sharp, technical aesthetic.
rules.letter_spacing: Apply tracking-tight (-0.025em) to all H1/H2 headings. Apply tracking-[0.2em] (uppercase) for small labels, overlines, and table headers.
rules.line_height: leading-none for headings, leading-relaxed for body text reading (critical for document comparison).

global_layout.container: h-screen w-full flex overflow-hidden bg-[#FDFDFD] text-[#09090B] font-body
global_layout.sidebar: w-72 or w-80 fixed left-0 top-0 h-full border-r border-zinc-200 bg-zinc-50 flex flex-col
global_layout.main_content: flex-1 ml-72 flex flex-col h-full overflow-hidden

spacing_rules.generous_padding: Use p-6 or p-8 inside cards/containers. Never let text touch borders.
spacing_rules.dense_lists: For document lists, use py-2 px-4 with 1px border-b to maximize vertical density.

sidebar_document_list.style: Flat, cardless, pure list. border-b border-zinc-200 between items.

chat_interface.user_message: bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-900 rounded-sm p-4 ml-auto max-w-[80%]
chat_interface.ai_message: bg-white border border-zinc-200 rounded-sm p-6 mr-auto max-w-[90%] shadow-sm relative
chat_interface.citations: text-xs font-mono bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-600 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-sm ml-1

confidence_bar.style: Absolute positioning at the top or bottom edge of the AI message card.
confidence_bar.logic: bg-emerald-500 for >80%, bg-amber-500 for 50-80%, bg-red-500 for <50%

contradiction_alert.style: Neo-brutalist alert box. Not soft. Demands attention.
contradiction_alert.classes: border border-red-500 border-l-4 bg-red-50 p-4 my-4 flex items-start gap-3
contradiction_alert.title: text-red-900 font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-xs

multi_document_compare.layout: grid grid-cols-2 gap-px bg-zinc-200 (1px gap creates grid borders).
multi_document_compare.highlighting: Shared terms or diffs highlighted with bg-yellow-200 text-yellow-900

document_map_umap.container: w-full h-full min-h-[500px] relative bg-zinc-50 border border-zinc-200
document_map_umap.chart: Use Recharts ScatterChart. Nodes colored by document. Tooltip shows chunk preview.
document_map_umap.background_texture: Use CSS radial-gradient or grid pattern for background to make it look like a technical blueprint.

controls_and_inputs.buttons: Square or rounded-sm. bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-blue-800 transition-colors font-medium tracking-wide
controls_and_inputs.search_switcher: Segmented control style. bg-zinc-100 p-1 rounded-sm flex gap-1
controls_and_inputs.chat_input: border border-zinc-300 rounded-sm focus-within:border-[#002FA7] focus-within:ring-1 focus-within:ring-[#002FA7] shadow-sm

tabs.style: Shadcn Tabs customized. No gray pill background. Use bottom-border active state. text-zinc-500 hover:text-zinc-900 data-[state=active]:text-[#002FA7] data-[state=active]:border-b-2 data-[state=active]:border-[#002FA7] rounded-none px-4 py-3 bg-transparent

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Crisp and immediate. Buttons -translate-y-[1px] with shadow-md. Links get underline.
motion_and_interaction.accessibility: Always ensure focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:ring-offset-2) on inputs and buttons.

images_and_assets.icons: Use lucide-react. Stroke width 1.5 for a sharp, technical look.

empty_state_background.description: Clean minimal white flowing texture for empty states or Map background.
empty_state_background.usage: Use as a low-opacity background image (opacity-20) in empty states to add subtle depth.

umap_visualization_reference.description: Abstract neural network and nodes reference.
umap_visualization_reference.usage: Use this as a placeholder image for the UMAP Map empty state or loading state.

implementation_instructions.fonts: Import Cabinet Grotesk (or Satoshi), IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono via Google Fonts or Fontshare in index.html.
implementation_instructions.shadcn_overrides: Do not use the default Shadcn rounded-md cards everywhere. The design is Swiss & High-Contrast; use flat surfaces with 1px borders (border-zinc-200) and square or slightly rounded corners (rounded-sm).
implementation_instructions.data_testids: Apply data-testid to ALL interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='upload-doc-btn', data-testid='chat-input-field', data-testid='export-pdf-btn', data-testid='compare-tab-trigger').
implementation_instructions.export_feature: For Chat Export to PDF, include a prominent header button 'Export PDF' using Lucide's Download icon.
